Home.title: Medix | Second Medical Opinion Platform
Home.subtitle: Second Medical Opinion Platform
Home.hero_headline: Policy-grade medical review intelligence for insurers and public institutions
Home.hero_subheadline: Medix helps organizations validate procedures before approval, align decisions to evidence-based protocols, and protect financial sustainability.
Home.hero_audience: Built for insurers, ministries, and governance teams
Home.intro_text: We are a company specialized in reviewing medical procedures before implementation and managing therapeutic costs for health insurance companies, acting as a strategic partner to ensure appropriate healthcare delivery while optimizing medical resources.
Home.value_quality_desc: Ensuring evidence-based treatments and optimal healthcare delivery.
Home.value_usage_desc: Eliminating medical resource waste and unjustified procedures.
Home.value_sustainability_desc: Building long-term financial stability for insurers.
Home.why_subtitle: A disciplined framework built for insurers, ensuring medical necessity, accountability, and financial integrity.
Home.why_body: Structured, auditable reviews that align medical protocols with insurer policies and governance standards.
Home.cta_subtitle: Partner with Medix to elevate decision quality, control costs, and strengthen portfolio performance.

About.title: About Medix
About.vision_text: To be the leading strategic partner for health insurance companies in the region in medical cost management and procedure review, by providing evidence-based medical solutions and cutting-edge technology.
About.mission_text: Empowering health insurance companies to make accurate, evidence-based medical decisions before implementing costly procedures, ensuring quality care, reducing unnecessary procedures, and achieving sustainable financial savings.

Services.title: Our Specialized Services
Services.subtitle: A structured portfolio of medical review services designed for insurer governance and clinical assurance.

review_before.title: Pre-Implementation Medical Review
review_before.desc: Reviewing high-cost procedures to ensure medical necessity and compliance with approved protocols.

surgeries.title: High-Cost Surgery Review
surgeries.desc: Evaluation of major surgical procedures by specialized physicians to ensure case eligibility according to international standards.

diagnostics.title: Advanced Diagnostic Test Review
diagnostics.desc: Ensuring tests like MRI and CT scans are medically required and the most appropriate diagnostic option.

second_opinion.title: Second Medical Opinion Programs
second_opinion.desc: Presenting complex cases to consultants to enhance medical decision accuracy and improve treatment outcomes.

cost_analysis.title: Medical Cost Analysis
cost_analysis.desc: Data analysis to identify cost drivers and detect patterns of excessive medical usage.

OperatingModel.title: Operating Model
OperatingModel.headline: Structured, Evidence-Based Review Workflow
OperatingModel.subhead: A disciplined process that ensures medical necessity, protocol alignment, and insurer-ready recommendations.
OperatingModel.step1: Receiving medical procedure request from the insurance company or hospital
OperatingModel.step2: Reviewing the complete medical file of the case
OperatingModel.step3: Evaluating the case according to approved medical protocols
OperatingModel.step4: Issuing a medical decision within a specific timeframe
OperatingModel.step5: Sending the recommendation to the insurance company for the final decision
OperatingModel.closeout_desc: All operations run through a secure decision-support platform for rapid turnaround and audit-ready documentation.

Technology.title: Technologies Used
Technology.desc: The company relies on an advanced technical platform for medical case management including:
Technology.highlight_desc: Our platform is built to manage high case volumes while preserving data security, quality assurance, and compliance.

Benefits.title: Benefits for Insurance Companies
Benefits.headline: Driving Efficiency and Clinical Quality
Benefits.subhead: Measurable strategic improvements for health insurance networks.
Benefits.benefit2: Improving the quality of medical decisions
Benefits.benefit5: Improving the experience of insured members
Benefits.highlight_desc: By preventing unjustified procedures, insurers realize immediate savings while elevating patient safety and care standards.

Partnership.title: Partnership Model
Partnership.model1: Fixed annual fee per insured member
Partnership.model1_desc: A predictable model based on the number of insured lives.
Partnership.model2_desc: Pay-per-review model suitable for specific high-cost procedure types.
Partnership.model3_desc: Fully customized programs tailored to specific underwriting needs.
